title: The Avali Project
description: Mod aimed to add content over multiple races, from avali to protogens, sergals and more..!
body:
# **The Avali Project**

The Avali Project is a mod that is designed to add content from multiple species. From avali to sergals and not forgetting protogens, this early mod aim to grasp everything that has been done around those species, their universe and implement them in game. More races could be added but this is for now an early build.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jtFi8f-pAtA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Content Added

- Food Items
- Ores
- Crops
- Tools
- Mobs

# Planned Content
- Dimensions (Avalon, Tal, Esmire IV..)
- Machines
- Companion
- Trading
- Vehicles

# Contributions

<details>
<summary>Models</summary>

- Loppan45
- Entity0504
- Djevra

</details>

## Information
_I'm still learning and trying to work on making this mod working, I have a lot of work ahead and all of this was made within a week. It may not be the best but at least I get to progress and make it somewhat stable. Anyone would be free to come and support since the project will be listed on github for those who has better knowledge than me!_

Discord: [https://discord.gg/BcKmBkQeEw](https://discord.gg/BcKmBkQeEw)
